entry.title: The Man of Stone of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: WriterDMathis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,943Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Sequel to Luminous Fragments From The Veil Above. After the fall of his homeworld, Kal—El begins his new life on Earth, adopted by Bruce Wayne and his four sons. As he discovers Earth, its strange customs, and the warmth of a new family, he also finds love with Bruce—and a home he never thought he’d have. And his Earth name is known as Clark. Clark Wayne.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 139,924Chapters: 12/14Kudos: 6

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,752Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 9

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sign of The Times
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,521Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: DR. BRUCE WAYNE ANNOUNCES DISCOVERY OF PREVIOUSLY UNDOCUMENTED STELLAR BODY THROUGH AEGIS DEEP FIELD INITIATIVE Acclaimed songwriter Clark Kent has built a career out of yearning, writing luminous heartbreak songs with the moon as his constant muse. What nobody knows is that his moon has always had a name: Bruce Wayne. Years after their painful breakup, Bruce resurfaces as the face of a historic space discovery—and names a newly found star in a way that feels both poetic and cruel. As old misunderstandings, public speculation, and unresolved love drag them back into each other’s orbit, Clark is forced to ask whether the man he has been singing about for years has been reaching back all along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,072Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 227

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Multiverse Trouble
entry.summary:
Author: NeptonicMistakes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,177Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Bruce and Clark get trapped into a storm that throws them across the multiverse. Facing different challenges and seeing different versions of their lives. How long will this last? How many worlds will they see? When will they finally get back to their world? Each chapter is a new world there are sucked into it! Some are planned already to be in the future! Feel Free to suggest a world you want to see the couple be thrown into and have to face! This, in a way, is a mix of one-shots. Doesn't really need to read in order to understand what is happening.

entry.title: don't make me cry (don't make me say it out loud)
entry.summary:
Author: bluebelled

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,951Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 45

Summary: “Ahh, so this is about expectations?” Clark huffed a small, incredulous laugh. He had started to pace slowly in the space between them, frustration evident in his posture.“I’d expect Brucie Wayne to be upstairs with his date by now, not arguing about ‘mission critical rest’ with me,” Clark took a deep breath. He noticed that Clark did little things like that, taking in air he didn’t need, staying behind to argue with Bruce when anyone else would have left. -------------------- AKA the Clark-jealousy fic where Bruce tries to get over Clark via his doppelganger!

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,018Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 95

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: Pretty Little Kitty
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,794Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: The Daily Planet can be so exhausting. Between submitting deadlines, running out to save the world, and water-cooler talk, Kal is exhausted. The only thing he wants is to go home, kick his shoes off, and play with his little kitty. After all, he did just buy Bruce that beautiful blue collar. *Can be read standalone*

entry.summary:

entry.title: Everybody knows
entry.summary:
Author: LukeWinssmett

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,599Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 266

Summary: The room looks like a cell. Too clean. Too white. A simulation of comfort. Yet, enclosed in a kind of glass box, too big to hold a bed and a few basic things: it's a complete room with a metal door. And in the centre, sitting in a simple chair, is a man.At first, Conner thinks he is an employee. A technician. Someone who angered his father enough to end up locked up. Then the man raises his head. His eyes — blue, intense — open with a mixture of surprise and something more dangerous. Recognition. "Kon-El"

entry.title: CLARK KENT X BRUCE WAYNE
entry.summary:
Author: orphan_account

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,337Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: The newsroom of the Daily Planet hummed with its usual energy.Phones ringing, keyboards clacking, headlines being chased like breaking storms.Clark Kent adjusted his glasses, scanning over a half finished article. Nothing felt big enough.Not one headline worthy. Not lately.“Still chasing the headlines, Kent?” Clark didn’t even need to look up.That voice carried a certain… confidence. “Bruce,”he said, glancing over with a smile. “Didn’t expect to see Bruce Wayne in Metropolis today hm?”

entry.title: Family Things… You Wouldn’t Get It
entry.summary:
Author: itsurllili95

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,197Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: It was supposed to be simple A rare, peaceful outing just the Bruce Wayne family taking a break, sitting in a quiet café, pretending (for once) to be normal No patrols, no villains, no chaos Just coffee Four cups of black coffee, bitter and predictable exactly how Bruce, Dick , Jason , and Tim like it And then there’s Damian Wayne With a matcha latte ( just some funny family moment and a pit of drama)
